overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player character walks along wet sidewalks past holographic advertisements, industrial zones, and crosses a major intersection toward a large transit station with escalators.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk next to elevated highway with holographic billboard

events.description: begins turning left at the corner near the holographic billboard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk toward a large anime-style holographic billboard

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking away from camera along the sidewalk ahead

entered.detail: tall vertical holographic display showing anime woman in red and green colors
green metal railing separating sidewalk from the street
large concrete highway structure running parallel to the sidewalk
modern skyscraper with illuminated windows rising behind the highway
tall street lamp casting yellow light through the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk city sidewalk at night, with the camera walking toward a prominent anime-style holographic billboard. The wet pavement reflects the street lamps and neon lights, while an elevated highway looms on the left. Sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk under concrete overpass with chain link fencing

events.description: turns left corner into industrial area beneath the highway overpass
ambient light decreases significantly when entering the shadow of the overpass

agents.ego_description: turns left at the corner and proceeds along a fenced industrial walkway beneath the highway

entered.detail: metal chain link fence with barbed wire topping running along the left side
industrial wooden pallets stacked behind the fence
corrugated metal industrial building visible behind the fencing
blue street sign with white text mounted on the fence

segments.scene_description: After turning left at the corner, the scene transitions to a darker, industrial area beneath the highway overpass. Chain link fencing and stacked pallets line the left side, while the concrete structure of the overpass dominates overhead. The lighting becomes noticeably dimmer in the shadow of the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with concrete retaining wall and holographic advertisement

agents.ego_description: walking along a long concrete wall, passing multiple pedestrians including some carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: woman with black umbrella walking toward camera on the right side
person in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall smooth concrete wall running the length of the sidewalk on the left
large vertical holographic advertisement displaying a man with sunglasses and a gun
piles of garbage bags and scattered cardboard boxes against the wall
circular decals with american flag patterns on the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along a lengthy concrete retaining wall, passing trash bags and american flag decals. A large holographic billboard featuring Johnny Silverhand becomes visible ahead. Several pedestrians walk toward the camera, some carrying umbrellas to shield from the heavy rain, while street lamps illuminate the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with transit station and escalators

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk and enters wide open intersection area
crossing the wet street at the intersection toward the transit station

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection toward the escalator station while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket crossing the street ahead toward the transit station

entered.detail: large building entrance with illuminated escalators and stairs leading underground
vertical neon sign spelling VOODOO on the side of a building
tall traffic light showing red signals above the intersection
white painted zebra stripes on the wet asphalt
tall palm trees lining the approach to the transit station
multiple illuminated advertisement panels at the base of the escalator structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide urban intersection, transitioning from the narrow sidewalk to an open plaza. The camera crosses the wet street toward a large transit station with illuminated escalators. Palm trees and digital advertising screens line the approach, while traffic lights and a prominent VOODOO neon sign punctuate the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk city, moving from a neon-lit sidewalk into a dim industrial underpass before opening into a wide urban plaza. It begins by walking along wet pavement toward a vibrant anime-style holographic billboard, with the reflections of street lamps shimmering under a looming elevated highway. As the camera turns left, the scene shifts into the oppressive shadows of the highway overpass, where the bright neon fades into a darker environment of chain-link fencing and stacked pallets. The path then proceeds along a concrete retaining wall past trash bags and decals, gradually brightening as a large holographic image of Johnny Silverhand appears ahead and pedestrians with umbrellas emerge through the heavy rain. Finally, the narrow walkway expands into a wide intersection, crossing the wet street toward a transit station with illuminated escalators and a prominent VOODOO neon sign.
